name: Intel Core i9 12900K 12th Gen Processor
description: Intel Core i9 12900K 12th Gen Processor What is Intel Core i9 12900K 12th Gen Processor price in Pakistan? Intel Core i9 12900K 12th Gen Processor price in Pakistan is Rs.98,500. This powerful hybrid CPU features 16 cores (8 Performance + 8 Efficient) and 24 threads with boost speeds up to 5.2 GHz, delivering strong performance for gaming and productivity tasks. Designed for the LGA 1700 platform, it supports both DDR4 and DDR5 memory along with PCIe 5.0 for high-speed graphics and storage. Shop
